channel.title: HLT — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on HLT (Hilton Worldwide) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Stephen Mandel: NEW POSITION HLT (+100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Stephen Mandel (Lone Pine Capital) new position HLT in Q4 2025 · 0.1% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Stephen Mandel)

item.title: Bill Nygren: TRIMMED HLT (-9%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Bill Nygren (Oakmark Funds) trimmed HLT in Q4 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.
